records.question: Which locations in Sacramento, CA at 6000 J St have rootbeer sold in Bottle containers and longitude exactly -121.42243?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN geolocation ON location.locationid = geolocation.locationid
JOIN rootbeer ON location.locationid = rootbeer.locationid
WHERE location.city = 'Sacramento' AND rootbeer.containertype = 'Bottle' AND geolocation.longitude = -121.42243 AND location.state = 'CA' AND location.streetaddress = '6000 J St'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT location.LocationID
FROM location
JOIN geolocation ON location.LocationID = geolocation.LocationID
JOIN rootbeer ON location.LocationID = rootbeer.LocationID
WHERE location.City = 'Sacramento'
  AND location.State = 'CA'
  AND location.StreetAddress = '6000 J St'
  AND geolocation.Longitude = -121.42243
  AND rootbeer.ContainerType = 'Bottle'
GROUP BY location.LocationID

records.question: Which locations named Sac State Union in California have a zipcode of at least 95819?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
WHERE location.zipcode >= 95819.0 AND location.state = 'CA' AND location.locationname = 'Sac State Union'
records.pred_sql: SELECT LocationID FROM location WHERE ZipCode >= 95819 AND State = 'CA' AND LocationName = 'Sac State Union'
